mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_ID , U.USER_LOGIN_ID , U.USER_NM , U.USER_PASSWORD , U.USER_IMAGE_URI , U.USER_EMAIL , U.USER_SEXDSTN , U.USER_USE , U.USER_LOCK , U.USER_MBTLNUM FROM SWC_USER U where upper(U.USER_ID) = upper(#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

SELECT U.USER_ID , U.USER_LOGIN_ID , U.USER_NM , U.USER_PASSWORD , U.USER_IMAGE_URI , U.USER_EMAIL , U.USER_SEXDSTN , U.USER_USE , U.USER_LOCK , U.USER_MBTLNUM FROM SWC_USER U WHERE UPPER(U.USER_LOGIN_ID) = UPPER(#{username, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

SELECT A.AUTHOR_ID AS AUTHORITY_ID , A.AUTHOR_CODE AS AUTHORITY_CODE , A.AUTHOR_CODE AS AUTHORITY FROM SWC_AUTHOR A INNER JOIN SWC_USER_AUTHOR UA ON UA.AUTHOR_ID = A.AUTHOR_ID AND UA.USER_ID = UPPER(#{username, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHERE A.AUTHOR_USE = 'Y' GROUP BY A.AUTHOR_ID ORDER BY A.AUTHOR_CODE

SELECT A.AUTHOR_ID , MAX(A.AUTHOR_CODE) AS AUTHORITY , MAX(AM.AUTHOR_VALUE) AS AUTHORITY_VALUE FROM SWC_USER U INNER JOIN SWC_USER_AUTHOR UA ON UA.USER_ID = U.USER_ID INNER JOIN SWC_AUTHOR A ON A.AUTHOR_ID = UA.AUTHOR_ID AND A.AUTHOR_USE = 'Y' INNER JOIN SWC_AUTHOR_MENU AM ON AM.AUTHOR_ID = A.AUTHOR_ID INNER JOIN SWC_MENU M ON M.MENU_ID = AM.MENU_ID AND M.MENU_CODE = UPPER(#{menuCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND M.MENU_USE = 'Y' WHERE U.USER_ID = UPPER(#{username, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) GROUP BY A.AUTHOR_ID
mapper.update: UPDATE SWC_USER SET USER_LAST_LOGIN_DT = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = UPPER(#{username, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SWC_REFRESH_TOKEN (USER_ID, REFRESH_TOKEN, EXPIRE_DT, UPDT_DT) VALUES (#{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{refreshToken, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expireDt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE REFRESH_TOKEN = VALUES(REFRESH_TOKEN), EXPIRE_DT = VALUES(EXPIRE_DT), UPDT_DT = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID AS userId , REFRESH_TOKEN AS refreshToken , EXPIRE_DT AS expireDt FROM SWC_REFRESH_TOKEN WHERE USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SWC_REFRESH_TOKEN WHERE USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
